title: Inspect and pin data
description: Opt-in grouped inspection adds a semantic crosshair, a complete HTML tooltip, keyboard traversal, and click-or-Enter pinning. The concise live announcement reports the shared x value and group count once, while every member remains navigable in ordinary DOM.

journey.pointer: Move across a shared x value to inspect its group, then click to pin it.
journey.keyboard: Tab to the chart, use the Arrow keys to inspect x groups, press Enter to pin, and press Escape to dismiss.
journey.touch: Tap an x group to pin its values; tap outside the chart to dismiss the inspection.
